summary: Completed comprehensive testing of prepaid balance management system for residents at Oakmere and Willowmere locations. All core functionality working correctly including resident management, transactions, history tracking, and reporting features.

fixed_issues.issue: VITE_API_URL was pointing to wrong backend URL causing CORS errors

passed_tests: Admin authentication required for all resident balance pages
Resident balance page loads correctly at /resident-balance with proper header
Summary cards display correct totals: Total Balance £37.50, Total Residents 3, With Balance 1, Zero Balance 2
Three resident cards display correctly: John Smith (£37.50), Bob Wilson (£0.00), Mary Johnson (£0.00)
Add Resident button opens modal with all required fields (residence number, name, location, about)
Location filter dropdown works with Oakmere and Willowmere options
Search functionality works for filtering residents by name/residence number
Resident cards show correct balance and action buttons (Top Up, Purchase, History)
Add Resident modal form validation and submission works
Transaction history page loads at /resident-history/:id with proper authentication
Resident history page shows John Smith details with current balance £37.50
Transaction history table displays 2 transactions with correct details
Date filters work on resident history page (From Date and To Date)
Print functionality available on resident history page
Transaction report page loads at /transaction-report with proper authentication
Report page shows comprehensive filters: Location, Resident, Type, Date range
Summary cards on report page show: Total Transactions 2, Top Ups +£50.00, Purchases -£12.50, Net Flow £37.50
Transactions table shows detailed view with Date, Resident, Location, Type, Description, Amount, Balance columns
All filter options work correctly (location, resident, transaction type, date range)
Clear All Filters button resets all filter selections
Print Report functionality available
Navigation between pages works correctly (back buttons, Reports button)
All backend API endpoints for residents and transactions work correctly
CRUD operations for residents function properly
Transaction creation (top-up and purchase) works with balance validation
Location-based filtering works for both Oakmere and Willowmere
Error handling works for duplicate residence numbers and insufficient balance
Balance summary calculations are accurate across all locations

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All resident and transaction API endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All prepaid balance management pages and features working correctly
success_percentage.integration: 100% - Frontend and backend integration working perfectly after environment fix
